did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper describes the creation and curation of a dermatoscopic image dataset (657 images) with high-quality clinical labeling for melanocytic and non-melanocytic neoplasms. While the abstract states the dataset is intended for use in machine learning and pattern recognition algorithms, the study itself does not employ AI/ML methods to obtain its results; it focuses on data collection, annotation, and metadata description.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
